headline: LyondellBasell Refocuses Portfolio As Dividend Cut Reshapes Shareholder Returns
summary: LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) has completed the sale of select European assets to AEQUITA, marking a significant change in its portfolio. The company has reduced its dividend by 50% following sustained pressure in the industry. These actions signal a reset of priorities across operations and capital returns for shareholders. LyondellBasell enters this transition with a mixed recent track record in the stock. The share price is $63.64, with the stock up 43.4% year to date and 13.2%...
